positive: A highly stylized, geometric composition featuring a forest of vibrant, bioluminescent flora and fauna. The central elements include stylized owls, crystalline mushrooms, and winding roots, all designed with clean, sharp silhouettes. The color palette must be jewel tones (deep emerald, sapphire blue, amethyst purple) contrasted with glowing accents of electric teal and lime green. Use a deep, midnight blue background, ensuring high contrast for print application. Style should be a mix of Art Nouveau flowing lines and modern geometric abstraction, suitable for a repeating apparel pattern or central graphic print. Focus on balanced symmetry and a strong, impactful centerpiece.
negative: blur, artifacts, noise, low detail, text, watermark, logo, signature, cartoon, sketch, messy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, worst quality, grayscale, photographic, realism
